summary: Iteration 20: P0 Product Rules Testing Complete. All features verified - Backend 100% (16/16 tests), Frontend 100% (all UI flows verified)

bar_tap_guest_confirmation_modal.details: Modal appears when selecting a tab, shows guest name, tab number, photo placeholder
tests_verified: Modal shows guest name (e.g., 'Kevin Brown')
Modal shows tab number (e.g., 'Tab #125')
Modal has Cancel and 'Confirm this guest' buttons
NO ID verification checkbox (correct - this is guest confirmation only)
Cancel closes modal and deselects tab
After confirming, items can be added without modal reappearing
Session confirmation persists in frontend state (confirmedSessions Set)

table_id_verification_modal.details: Modal appears only when adding alcoholic items to table, requires checkbox before confirm
tests_verified: Modal appears when adding Beer (is_alcohol=true) item
Modal title: 'ID Verification Required - Alcohol service compliance'
Checkbox label: 'I have verified this guest's ID (21+)'
Confirm button disabled until checkbox checked
After verification, 'ID verified' badge appears on session
Subsequent alcohol items added without modal (verification cached)
Non-alcoholic items do NOT trigger ID verification modal

backend_tap_session_guest_photo.verified: Returns guest_photo, guest_name, tab_number, id_verified fields

backend_verify_id_endpoint.verified: Marks session as id_verified=true, records timestamp and audit event

backend_table_detail_id_verified.verified: Returns session.id_verified and session.id_verified_at in response

tests_verified: GET /api/venue/{vid}/events/{eid}/guests - lists event guests with enriched Pulse data
POST /api/venue/{vid}/events/{eid}/guests - adds Pulse guest to event (temporal presence)
DELETE /api/venue/{vid}/events/{eid}/guests/{gid} - removes guest from event without deleting from Pulse
Event guests enriched with name, photo, email, phone, visits, spend_total, tags from Pulse

event_end_clears_guests.verified: Clears all event_guests (temporal presence) while guest data remains in Pulse

tests_verified: GET /api/venue/{vid}/events/{eid}/staff - lists event staff with enriched names
POST /api/venue/{vid}/events/{eid}/staff - assigns staff with role and hourly_rate snapshot
DELETE /api/venue/{vid}/events/{eid}/staff/{sid} - removes staff from event
Staff enriched with name from venue_barmen collection

catalog_is_alcohol_field.verified: Catalog items have is_alcohol field. Beers category items have is_alcohol=true, Non-alcoholic items have is_alcohol=false

seed_data_creation: Used existing demo data - no new seed data required
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 Product Rules fully implemented and tested. Bar/Tap has GuestConfirmModal (shows name, tab#, photo placeholder, confirm/cancel). Table has IDVerificationModal (checkbox required for alcohol items, badge after verification, verification cached in session.meta.id_verified). Events: event_guests collection is temporal (cleared on event end), venue_guests is global Pulse data. Event staff has role + hourly_rate snapshot.

ui_screenshots.tap_guest_confirm_modal: Shows guest name, Tab #, photo placeholder, Cancel and 'Confirm this guest' buttons
ui_screenshots.table_id_verification_modal: Shows yellow shield icon, 'ID Verification Required' title, checkbox 'I have verified this guest's ID (21+)', disabled Confirm until checked
ui_screenshots.table_id_verified_badge: Green 'ID verified' badge appears on session after verification

architectural_notes.guest_confirmation_vs_id_verification: Guest confirmation (TAP) is for identity confirmation before ordering. ID verification (TABLE) is for alcohol compliance (21+). Different modals, different purposes.
architectural_notes.event_memory_model: Events start empty. Guests in Pulse are global. event_guests is temporal presence that gets cleared when event ends. venue_guests data persists forever.
architectural_notes.staff_snapshot: Event staff assignment captures role and hourly_rate at assignment time - allows historical accuracy even if staff rates change later.
